2.display: A number greater than 4 is more likely: P(3) = 1/6, P(>4) = 2/6.

5.display: No — on a fair dice every face is equally likely.

6.display: Unfair — P(Win) = 6/8 and P(Lose) = 2/8, so Win is more likely.

7.display: Six ways to total 7: (1,6), (2,5), (3,4), (4,3), (5,2), (6,1). 36 equally likely outcomes for two dice.

8.display: Fair spinner with three equal sections — e.g. each colour probability 1/3.
